method: glucose relaxed-UNSAT (explicit CNF, piece-CEGAR, no connectivity, sound translation anchor) at k=v-1 over the certified grid window

results.detail: n=1: v=1, k=v-1=0 < n floor; trivially a(n)>=1
n=2: v=2, k=v-1=1 < n floor; trivially a(n)>=2
n=3: relaxed-UNSAT at k=3 on all 1 window grids => a(n) >= 4 (independent of connectivity)
n=4: relaxed-UNSAT at k=5 on all 2 window grids => a(n) >= 6 (independent of connectivity)
n=5: relaxed-UNSAT at k=8 on all 1 window grids => a(n) >= 9 (independent of connectivity)
n=6: relaxed-UNSAT at k=11 on all 2 window grids => a(n) >= 12 (independent of connectivity)
n=7: relaxed-UNSAT at k=16 on all 2 window grids => a(n) >= 17 (independent of connectivity)
n=8: relaxed-UNSAT at k=19 on all 2 window grids => a(n) >= 20 (independent of connectivity)
n=9: relaxed-UNSAT at k=25 on all 2 window grids => a(n) >= 26 (independent of connectivity)
n=10: relaxed-UNSAT at k=30 on all 4 window grids => a(n) >= 31 (independent of connectivity)
